OCE FFA Network

Built for OCE players

The only good FFA in the OCE region, OCEFFA is a server filled with custom plugins such as weapons, bosses and lootdrops so your playthroughs never get boring.

We prioratise playability and not pay-ability so there is ZERO pay to win accesible to players.

Keys & Crates

Crate System

Buy a key, open the crate, keep whatever drops until death. Crate weapons only come from Prime Crates & kills.

Tier 1
Basic Crate
Materials and armor trim templates.
  • Armor Trim Template ×4Common
  • Amethyst Shard ×4Common
  • Copper Ingot ×4Common
  • Iron Ingot ×4Common
  • Arrow ×4Common
  • Gold Ingot ×4Uncommon
  • Diamond ×4Rare
  • Emerald ×4Rare
  • Netherite Scrap ×4Epic
Tier 2
Plus Crate
Combat potions, plus a shot at a free Prime key.
  • Speed II Splash (0:90)Rare 41.7%
  • Slowness VI / Resistance IVRare 41.7%
  • Compressed Potion (Str II + Speed + Fire Res)Epic 11.1%
  • Prime Crate KeyLegendary 5.6%
Tier 3
Prime Crate
Custom weapons only!
  • Berserker AxeExclusive
  • BulwarkExclusive
  • Cleave AxeExclusive
  • Dash SwordExclusive
  • Freeze SwordExclusive
  • Glacier AxeExclusive
  • Grapple AxeExclusive

  • Lightning SwordExclusive

Prime Crate Exclusive

Custom Weapons

Custom weapons, made for OCE FFA! Found in crates, in game store & A special event only 1 of 1.

Mythic · AxePrime Crate
Berserker Axe

Every hit builds rage. Use the ability for strength and speed.

  • Hit players: Rage: builds rage from hits
  • Offhand: Berserk: gives strength and speed, slows nearby enemies (18s cooldown)
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · SwordPrime Crate
Bulwark

The anti-team sword! Take hits to build damage letting it out in one devistating attack.

  • Passive: Resolve: counts melee hits taken within 8s
  • Sneak + Offhand: Shockwave: after 4 hits, blast enemies away + more crits, more knockback (21s cooldown)
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · AxePrime Crate
Cleave Axe

Send out a sharp slash, dealing damage to all that make contact with it.

  • Offhand: Cleave: heavy frontal arc, damage + knockback (11s cooldown)
  • Passive: Execute: bonus damage to low targets (on cooldown)
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · SwordPrime Crate
Dash Sword

Triggers a forward dash on offhand in the direction of where your looking!

  • Offhand: Dash: launches you forward (13s cooldown)
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · SwordPrime Crate
Freeze Sword

Attack your target to eventually freeze them!

  • Hit players: Frost Prison: freezes movement after 5 hits, freeze lasts 3s (30s cooldown)
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · AxePrime Crate
Glacier Axe

A freeze on offhand, stunning your opponent.

  • Offhand: Permafrost: frost burst with light damage and a short slow (14s cooldown)
  • Passive: Chill hits sometimes chill briefly (on cooldown)
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · AxePrime Crate
Grapple Axe

Bring your enemy right where you want them.

  • Offhand: Harpoon: yank the player you aim at toward you, briefly slows them on arrival (12s cooldown)
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · SwordPrime Crate
LifeSteal Sword

Mark your target on hit, then drain their hearts.

  • Hit player: Mark: marks the target for 7s
  • Offhand: Life Steal: damages the target and heals you, gives temporary hearts and regeneration (20s cooldown)
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · SwordPrime Crate
Lightning Sword

Land 5 hits and a summon lightning that strikes down on your target.

  • Hit players: Storm Strike: strikes lightning after 5 hits, deals bonus damage (15s cooldown)
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · SwordPrime Crate
Silk Edge

Web your targets and poison them.

  • Offhand: Web Shot: webs the enemy you look at for 10s (20s cooldown)
  • Double Sneak + Offhand: Silk Slash: clears webs in a 3x3 and blocks re-webbing (120s cooldown)
  • Passive: Venom Combo: 4 crits on a webbed enemy grant +1 heart & Strength I, combo end gives you Weakness I unless they die (75s cooldown)
  • Passive: Thread Walker: grants Weaving while held, walk through cobwebs at 50% speed
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · SwordPrime Crate
Sonic Edge

Shoot the wardens blasts!

  • Offhand: Sonic Blast: fires a Warden sonic beam, hits the first enemy for 2 hearts (20s cooldown)
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · SwordPrime Crate
Surge Edge

Stop enemys in their tracks.

  • Offhand: Shockwave: cone of force damages and knocks back foes (14s cooldown)
  • Sneak + Offhand: Brace: Resistance for a few seconds (22s cooldown)
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · BowPrime Crate
Teleport Bow

Hold shift while shooting to teleport to wherever the arrow lands.

  • Shift + Shoot: Teleport Shot: teleports you to where the arrow lands (30s cooldown)
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · CrossbowPrime Crate
Void Bow

Explosive arrows that deal massive damage & shatter webs.

  • Loaded: drains 2 HP per second while charged
  • On hit: Void Burst: explodes for 2 hearts in a 3x3, shatters cobwebs on impact (12s cooldown)
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · SwordPrime Crate
Wither Edge

A grave blast that withers and corodes all that comes near.

  • Offhand: Grave Blast: explodes for 1 heart in a 4.5-block radius, applies Wither II + Darkness (24s cooldown)
◆ Drops from Prime Crates
Mythic · SwordIn-Game Store
Bloodlust

More hits = more damage aswell as on kill effects!

  • Passive: Combo: +2% damage per hit up to 9 hits, max combo grants Strength
  • Passive: Bloodlust: kills grant Speed + Regen, streaks add Strength
  • Offhand:Grapple: pulls the enemy you look at toward you (12s cooldown)
◆ Sold in the in-game store
Mythic · SwordIn-Game Store
Echo

Set a position and teleport back!

  • Offhand: Set Anchor: marks your current position
  • Sneak + Offhand: Blink Back: return to your anchor within 35 blocks (20s cooldown)
  • Passive: Echo: every 4th hit deals 1.5x damage
◆ Sold in the in-game store
Mythic · SwordIn-Game Store
Gravity

Send the enemy flying or right to you.

  • Offhand: Ground Slam: pulls in nearby enemies and lifts them (14s cooldown)
  • Sneak + Offhand: Anchor: Resistance III + Slow Falling for 4s (35s cooldown)
  • Passive: Sure Footing: no fall damage while held
◆ Sold in the in-game store
Mythic · SwordIn-Game Store
Leech

Heals you while stealing the opponents health!

  • Passive: Lifesteal: heal a little with every melee hit
  • Offhand: Siphon: gain an Absorption shield (18s cooldown)
◆ Sold in the in-game store
Mythic · SwordIn-Game Store
Stun Edge

Stop your enemy in their tracks, with the click of a key.

  • Passive: Chill: every 6th hit applies Slowness VI for 2s
  • Offhand: Stun: freezes the enemy you look at for 3s (90s cooldown)
◆ Sold in the in-game store
Mythic · SwordIn-Game Store
Tempest

Every hit makes you faster, until someone hits back.

  • Passive: Momentum: +10% speed per hit, up to +50%
  • Taking damage or losing the weapon resets your speed
◆ Sold in the in-game store
Mythic · AxeIn-Game Store
Tremor Axe

Slam the ground with a quake that debufs your enemys!

  • Offhand: Quake: slam the ground for damage + launch on nearby foes, applies Mining Fatigue (12s cooldown)
◆ Sold in the in-game store
Mythic · Helmet1 of 1
Wraith

The only netherite helmet on the entire server.

  • Passive: Wraithbound: Protection IV + permanent Speed I while worn
  • Offhand: Wraith Surge: Speed IV + Strength IV for 9s, first hit deals 1.75x damage (30s cooldown)
  • Weakness after the surge: Slowness III and 7 max hearts for 3s
◆ 1 of 1 — only one exists

Read This First

Rules and FAQ

Break them and staff will deal with it.

General
  • Use /kit claim diamond_smp and jump down to fight.
  • No hacks or unfair clients: reach, X-ray, auto-clickers, all of it.
  • No exploiting bugs or glitches.
  • No racism, hate speech, or discriminatory language.
  • Be respectful to players and staff.
  • Staff decisions are final.
Combat
  • No glitching into sealed rooms or arenas.
  • No bowing from spawn.
  • No bucket draining.
  • No repeated kill farming.
Community
  • Join the Discord with /discord.
  • Check the in-game info board for updates.
  • Rule violations scale from warnings up to permanent bans.

Checkout runs through Craftingstore's secure payment page, major credit and debit cards, plus PayPal where it's available in your region.

Delivery is instant and automatic once payment clears. If a rank or key hasn't applied within a few minutes, try rejoining the server, if it's still missing, reach out on Discord through a ticket.

Yes. Every rank is a one-time purchase and stays on your account for good, there's no subscription to keep paying.

Because ranks, keys, and crate rewards are delivered instantly and consumed in-game, all sales are generally final. If you were charged in error or something clearly went wrong on our end, message staff on Discord with your order details and we'll sort it out.

Double-check the in-game username you entered at checkout, then rejoin the server. Still missing? Open a ticket in Discord with your order ID or receipt email and staff will manually apply it.

Oceania's custom FFA, brought to you by a wide range of developers!
